title: The Agent files a close-out control record for the Acme enterprise-customer wire-flag monitoring review on JE-acme_cloud-FP-2026-04-0052 in the Records Vault.
justification: The prompt says to 'file the close-out record in the vault' and to 'prepare that record as our evidence the review was performed.' This is the central required write action that produces the firm's evidence the AML monitoring review was completed.
evidence: Look for a records-vault upload-document call tied to the review on JE-acme_cloud-FP-2026-04-0052 (for example related_resource_id je_b2c2b939a1244823, related_resource_type journal_entry), returning a success response. The upload must occur for this rubric to pass.

title: The Agent files the close-out record classified restricted, matching the comparable Acme AML records already on file (the Acme Cloud FY2026 AML Risk Assessment Memo and the Acme Cloud FY2026 Beneficial Owner Refresh), not the internal default.
justification: The prompt says to hold the record 'classified to match the comparable Acme AML records already on file, not whatever a new document defaults to.' Both comparable Acme AML memos are classified restricted, whereas the routine journal-entry support document on this same entry defaults to internal. Mirroring the comparable AML records rather than the default is the discriminating requirement.
evidence: Check the classification parameter of the vault upload for restricted. The comparable AML records doc_38a8236a0c4546e2 and doc_fb028c9124e146c5 are classification restricted; the routine support document doc_770062b1b39b4c41 on this same entry is internal. A record filed internal or public fails.

title: The Agent files the close-out record under a document kind of memo or audit_evidence, the kind comparable compliance control records are held under, not a newly invented kind.
justification: The prompt says to 'hold it the way a compliance control record of this kind is held here.' The comparable Acme AML records are kind memo, and audit_evidence is the firm's standing kind for evidence that a control was performed; both are valid. A free-text invented kind such as aml_review or compliance_record is not a real document kind on this firm.
evidence: Check the kind parameter of the vault upload. It must be one of: memo or audit_evidence. Both are grounded document kinds in the Records Vault (the comparable AML records are kind memo; audit_evidence is widely used for control evidence). A free-text invented kind fails.

title: The Agent's close-out record states that the counterparty and source-of-funds review was performed by Farah Dlamini (or similar).
justification: The prompt asks to establish 'that the counterparty and source-of-funds work was actually completed' and to 'prepare that record as our evidence the review was performed.' Farah Dlamini performed the counterparty alignment and the source-of-funds rationale for this review.
evidence: Check the content of the vault upload for a statement that the counterparty and source-of-funds review was performed by Farah Dlamini (or similar).

title: The Agent's close-out record states that supervisory sign-off by Anita Knowles is on record (or similar).
justification: The prompt asks to establish that supervisory clearance is truly on record and to relay that into the close-out record. Anita Knowles granted supervisory sign-off in the clearance thread.
evidence: Check the content of the vault upload for a statement that supervisory sign-off by Anita Knowles is on record (or similar).

title: The Agent's close-out record states that partner clearance by Steven Perry is on record (or similar).
justification: The prompt asks to establish that partner clearance is truly on record and to relay that into the close-out record. Steven Perry granted partner clearance in the clearance thread.
evidence: Check the content of the vault upload for a statement that partner clearance by Steven Perry is on record (or similar).

title: The Agent's close-out record relays the disposition as CLEAR with no SAR (or similar).
justification: The prompt says 'what disposition they reached. The disposition is settled, so relay it faithfully into the close-out record rather than reopening it.' The review concluded CLEAR with no SAR.
evidence: Check the content of the vault upload for the disposition CLEAR with no SAR (or similar). The disposition must be relayed faithfully, not reopened or altered.

title: The Agent clears the now-moot 'Review AML threshold alert for JE-acme_cloud-FP-2026-04-0052' reminder.
justification: The prompt says if the check surfaces anything 'still sitting open when it should not be, deal with it rather than simply flag it.' This AML threshold-alert reminder (due 2026-05-02) instructed completing the review and routing it to the supervisory gate; both clearances landed by 2026-04-30, so it is the single residual open item and must be cleared, not merely noted.
evidence: Look for a reminder delete call with reminder_id reminder_scen_041_audit_compliance_0000, returning a success response. Merely noting the reminder, or leaving it open, fails.

title: The Agent sends an email to peter.sanchez@brookfieldcpas.com with anita.knowles@brookfieldcpas.com in CC.
justification: The prompt says 'send the outcome to Peter so compliance leadership holds the closed picture, and copy Anita, who carried the supervisory sign-off.' Peter Sanchez (Head of Compliance) is the recipient and Anita Knowles is the required CC.
evidence: Look for a send-email call with recipient peter.sanchez@brookfieldcpas.com and CC containing anita.knowles@brookfieldcpas.com, returning a success response.

title: The Agent's email to Peter Sanchez conveys that the Acme wire-flag review on JE-acme_cloud-FP-2026-04-0052 is confirmed genuinely complete and closed CLEAR with no SAR (or similar).
justification: The prompt asks to 'send the outcome to Peter so compliance leadership holds the closed picture.' The outcome is that the review is confirmed genuinely complete and closed CLEAR with no SAR.
evidence: Check the content parameter of the email to peter.sanchez@brookfieldcpas.com for a statement that the review on JE-acme_cloud-FP-2026-04-0052 is confirmed complete and closed CLEAR with no SAR (or similar).

title: The Agent posts a note to the #compliance-and-registrations Slack channel (channel C008).
justification: The prompt says 'Drop a brief note in the compliance channel so the team can see the wire review is closed.' The compliance channel is #compliance-and-registrations (channel C008).
evidence: Look for a Slack add-message call targeting channel_id C008 (#compliance-and-registrations), returning a success response.

title: The Agent's note in #compliance-and-registrations states that the Acme enterprise-customer wire-flag review on JE-acme_cloud-FP-2026-04-0052 is closed CLEAR with no SAR (or similar).
justification: The prompt says to drop a note 'so the team can see the wire review is closed.' The note must communicate that the Acme wire-flag review is closed CLEAR with no SAR.
evidence: Check the payload parameter of the Slack message to channel C008 for a statement that the Acme wire-flag review on JE-acme_cloud-FP-2026-04-0052 is closed CLEAR with no SAR (or similar).

title: The Agent schedules a future AML control-effectiveness review for the wire-flag threshold calibration on the calendar as a standing next-cycle item.
justification: The prompt says 'set the next control-effectiveness review on the calendar as a recurring item, because the threshold calibration Steven flagged on this rule will come round again.' The only existing control-effectiveness event already passed (2026-06-03) and the next-cycle review is genuinely not yet scheduled, so a new future event must be placed; an agent that trusts the channel chatter claiming it is already scheduled performs no write.
evidence: Look for an add-calendar-event call with a start date in the future (after 2026-06-12) and a title or description referencing the AML control-effectiveness review or the wire-flag threshold calibration, returning a success response. A specific future date is not required; any future placement passes.

title: The Agent reports that the counterparty and source-of-funds review was genuinely completed by Farah Dlamini, not merely opened (or similar).
justification: The prompt asks to 'establish where it genuinely landed. That the counterparty and source-of-funds work was actually completed.' The user wants confirmation the work was truly performed, on the strength of the actual record.
evidence: Check the agent's final response for a statement that the counterparty and source-of-funds review was actually completed by Farah Dlamini (or similar).

title: The Agent reports that supervisory sign-off by Anita Knowles is on record (or similar).
justification: The prompt asks to establish that supervisory clearance is truly on record. The user wants this confirmed from the actual record before closing the file.
evidence: Check the agent's final response for a statement that supervisory sign-off by Anita Knowles is on record (or similar).

title: The Agent reports that partner clearance by Steven Perry is on record (or similar).
justification: The prompt asks to establish that partner clearance is truly on record. The user wants this confirmed from the actual record before closing the file.
evidence: Check the agent's final response for a statement that partner clearance by Steven Perry is on record (or similar).

title: The Agent reports that the review genuinely landed CLEAR with no SAR (or similar).
justification: The prompt says to 'confirm the real state before we shut it' and to establish 'what disposition they reached,' wanting the close founded on the actual record rather than on an alert saying the work is finished. The disposition is CLEAR with no SAR.
evidence: Check the agent's final response for a statement that the review concluded CLEAR with no SAR (or similar), confirmed from the record.
